name: physical-commerce
description: Dispute resolution for agent-purchased physical products — wrong items, damage, non-delivery, returns. Designed for x402 commerce platforms like Rye + AgentCash.

rules.condition:
delivery_confirmed == true AND
received_matches_order == true AND
product_as_described == false

return_requested == true AND
return_approved == false AND
return_window_active == true
rules.ruling_template:
Return request denied while within the return window.
Return window: {return_window_days} days
Days since delivery: {days_since_delivery}
Return denied without stated reason.

Return should have been accepted. Full refund owed.

rules.condition:
delivery_confirmed == true AND
received_matches_order == true AND
product_as_described == true
